tasks.title: Bump TanStack Start/Router family and Vite in apps/admin
tasks.description:
Bump apps/admin/package.json: vite to ^7.0.0, @tanstack/react-start to 1.168.27, @tanstack/react-router to 1.170.17, @tanstack/router-plugin to 1.168.19, @tanstack/react-router-ssr-query to 1.167.1, @tanstack/react-router-devtools to 1.167.0. Remove @vitejs/plugin-react from both deps and devDeps. Run pnpm install to regenerate the lockfile. This is a dependency-only change, commit separately from code changes per spec's rollback-independence requirement.

Test requirements: no unit tests (dependency-only task). Verify via `pnpm install` exiting 0 with no peer-dependency errors, and `pnpm ls @tanstack/react-router --filter apps/admin` showing 1.170.17 resolved.

DONE NOTES: vite was already ^8.1.2 (repo drifted ahead of the stale spec's 6.4.1 baseline) and satisfies react-start's `>=7.0.0` peer, so no vite bump was needed. Removed the obsolete `patches/@tanstack__start-plugin-core@1.131.26.patch` (circular CSS chunk-import recursion fix) — confirmed upstream 1.171.19 fixes the same bug natively with proper cycle-detection (visited-state tracking), source inspected via npm pack. pnpm install succeeded; only pre-existing unrelated peer warnings remain (expo/react-native/tiptap/qzpay-drizzle in other workspaces, csstype on dev-only devtools packages).

subtasks.title: Bump vite + 5 @tanstack/* packages to target versions
Remove @vitejs/plugin-react from deps and devDeps
Run pnpm install and regenerate lockfile
Verify no peer-dependency conflicts

tasks.title: Remove @vitejs/plugin-react from vite.config.ts
tasks.description:
TanStack Start >= 1.132.0 internalizes the React plugin. In apps/admin/vite.config.ts, remove `import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'`, remove the `react()` plugin call, and remove `customViteReactPlugin: true` from the `tanstackStart()` options.

Test requirements: no dedicated unit test (config file). Verify via `pnpm build --filter apps/admin` completing without plugin-react-related errors.

subtasks.title: Remove react import and react() plugin call
Remove customViteReactPlugin: true flag

tasks.title: Rewrite server.ts to the new non-curried createStartHandler API
tasks.description:
In apps/admin/src/server.ts, replace the curried `createStartHandler({ createRouter })` + `defineHandlerCallback` pattern with the new direct-callback API: `export default createStartHandler(({ request }) => { const router = createRouter(); return defaultStreamHandler({ request, router }); })`. Keep the existing /healthz path-intercept logic (healthcheckResponse) running BEFORE this handler, unchanged.

Test requirements: existing test/routes/__root.ssr-guard.test.ts must still pass unmodified (guards against SSR singleton leaks). Add a smoke assertion that the exported default handler is callable and returns a Response for a basic GET request.

subtasks.title: Replace curried handler with direct createStartHandler callback
Remove defineHandlerCallback usage
Confirm /healthz intercept still runs before the new handler

tasks.title: Rename getWebRequest() to getRequest() in auth-session.ts
tasks.description:
In apps/admin/src/lib/auth-session.ts, update the import and all call sites from `getWebRequest()` to `getRequest()` per the TanStack Start >= 1.132.0 rename. Grep apps/admin/src for any other getWebRequest usages and update those too.

Test requirements: existing auth-session unit/integration tests must pass unmodified. If none exist for this file, add a minimal test asserting the session-resolution function still returns the expected shape given a mocked request.

subtasks.title: Update import and rename call sites in auth-session.ts
Grep apps/admin/src for other getWebRequest usages

tasks.title: Replace registerGlobalMiddleware with createStart() in start.ts
tasks.description:
In apps/admin/src/start.ts, replace `registerGlobalMiddleware({ middleware: [cspMiddleware] })` with `export const start = createStart({ serverFnMiddleware: [cspMiddleware], requestMiddleware: [cspMiddleware] })`. Adding requestMiddleware is what enables SSR-level CSP coverage (consumed by T-006 and T-010).

Test requirements: add/update a unit test (apps/admin/test/start.test.ts) asserting the exported `start` object wires cspMiddleware into both serverFnMiddleware and requestMiddleware arrays.

subtasks.title: Replace registerGlobalMiddleware with createStart()
Wire cspMiddleware into serverFnMiddleware and requestMiddleware
Write/update start.ts unit test

tasks.title: Wire CSP nonce pipeline in router.tsx
tasks.description:
In apps/admin/src/router.tsx: implement `getCspNonce` via `createIsomorphicFn()` (server side reads the nonce from `getGlobalStartContext()`; client side reads it from `<meta property="csp-nonce" content="{nonce}">`). Pass `ssr: { nonce: getCspNonce() }` to `createRouter()`. Ensure `HeadContent` emits the csp-nonce meta tag so the client can hydrate it. Remove the `import './start'` side-effect import if `createStart()` (T-005) now replaces it; verify the middleware registration path still fires.

Test requirements: new test apps/admin/test/router.csp-nonce.test.ts covering both the server path (mock getGlobalStartContext returning a nonce) and the client path (mock a document meta tag and assert getCspNonce reads it).

subtasks.title: Implement getCspNonce via createIsomorphicFn (server + client paths)
Pass ssr.nonce to createRouter()
Emit csp-nonce meta tag via HeadContent
Remove/verify './start' side-effect import
Write router.csp-nonce.test.ts

tasks.title: Verify middleware.ts compatibility with the new TanStack Start version
tasks.description:
In apps/admin/src/middleware.ts, no API changes are expected (still uses `createMiddleware`), but verify compatibility against the bumped TanStack Start version and fix any surfaced typecheck/runtime issues.

Test requirements: existing middleware tests must still pass unmodified. If a breakage is found, add a regression test reproducing it before fixing (per project's bug-fix testing standard).

subtasks.title: Review middleware.ts against TanStack Start changelog for the target version
Run existing middleware tests and fix any breakage

tasks.title: Verify dev server, build, typecheck, and lint after the core rewrite
tasks.description:
After T-002, T-003, T-004, T-005, and T-007 land, run `pnpm dev:admin` (manual smoke, confirm it starts without errors), `pnpm build` (root), `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm lint`. Fix any errors surfaced by the version bump or the API rewrites before proceeding to CSP/testing phases.

Test requirements: this is a verification task; no new test files unless a discovered regression needs a dedicated regression test, in which case follow the project's bug-fix testing standard (test reproducing the bug before the fix).

subtasks.title: Run pnpm dev:admin smoke check
Run pnpm build and fix errors
Run pnpm typecheck and fix errors
Run pnpm lint and fix errors

tasks.title: Validate third-party Vite 7 compatibility
tasks.description:
Verify apps/admin's better-auth Vite-internals workaround plugin (fix-better-auth-ssr-optimize), vite-tsconfig-paths, @tailwindcss/vite, and the Rollup manualChunks config all work correctly under Vite 7. Rewrite or remove the better-auth workaround if Vite 7 fixes the underlying issue it patches around. Compare production build chunk sizes against the pre-migration baseline (must stay within 20%).

Test requirements: run the full auth flow (login, session validation, protected routes) as an integration test/manual smoke and confirm it passes; document the before/after build chunk-size comparison in the task notes.

subtasks.title: Verify/rewrite better-auth Vite-internals workaround plugin
Verify vite-tsconfig-paths and @tailwindcss/vite compatibility
Compare manualChunks build output sizes vs baseline
Run full auth flow smoke test

tasks.title: Verify CSP header coverage on SSR initial page loads and nonce hydration
tasks.description:
Verify that `createStart({ requestMiddleware })` (T-005) now makes CSP headers present on ALL admin responses, including the SSR initial HTML document (previously only server-function responses were covered). Verify the nonce set in T-006 appears correctly in rendered `<script>` tags and resolves identically via `getCspNonce()` on both server and client, with no hydration mismatch warnings.

Test requirements: integration test asserting a root-route response includes a Content-Security-Policy(-Report-Only) header with a nonce; run a production build (`NODE_ENV=production`) and check the browser console for zero hydration warnings. All existing CSP report-only tests must still pass.

subtasks.title: Write integration test for SSR CSP header + nonce presence
Verify curl -I on root route returns CSP header with nonce
Production build hydration check (no console warnings)
Confirm existing CSP report-only tests still pass

tasks.title: Re-validate /healthz behavior on the upgraded TanStack Start version
tasks.description:
Confirm apps/admin's /healthz endpoint still returns `200 {"status":"ok"}` without invoking React SSR, the CSP middleware, the _authed auth guard, or any billing construction, on the bumped TanStack Start version. Per apps/admin/CLAUDE.md, also re-evaluate whether TanStack Start server.handlers routes are still a no-op at this version or whether the path-intercept workaround in server.ts can now be replaced by a proper server route — document the finding either way, only change the implementation if route-based handling is verified safe.

Test requirements: existing/updated healthz test must assert 200 status, correct JSON body, and absence of SSR/auth/billing side effects. Add a regression test if none currently exists for this behavior.

subtasks.title: Run /healthz smoke and confirm response shape unchanged
Re-evaluate server.handlers viability at the new version
Add/update healthz regression test

tasks.title: Lift the @tanstack/react-router Dependabot ignore
tasks.description:
In .github/dependabot.yml, remove the `@tanstack/react-router` ignore entry now that the family is aligned on the target versions and /healthz has been re-validated (T-011). Leave the `@tanstack/react-router-devtools` ignore entry as-is (owned separately by HOS-58). Update the explanatory comment block to remove the now-resolved router entry.

Test requirements: none (config-only). Verify the file remains valid YAML.

subtasks.title: Remove @tanstack/react-router ignore entry
Update explanatory comment block

tasks.title: Update apps/admin/CLAUDE.md /healthz documentation
tasks.description:
Update the /healthz section of apps/admin/CLAUDE.md, which currently states the router is pinned 'until SPEC-045 takes on the upgrade and re-validates /healthz'. Reflect the new TanStack Start version, the T-011 re-validation outcome, and remove the stale SPEC-045/Dependabot-ignore reference now that it's lifted (T-012).

Test requirements: none (docs-only).

subtasks.title: Update /healthz section with new version + re-validation outcome
